metadata.description: Curated sources for production time series forecasting: temporal validation/backtesting, feature engineering, model selection, and deployment considerations.

foundational_books_and_papers.name: Forecasting: Principles and Practice (3rd ed.)
foundational_books_and_papers.relevance: Canonical reference for forecasting principles, evaluation, and backtesting workflows.

foundational_books_and_papers.name: DeepAR: Probabilistic Forecasting with Autoregressive Recurrent Networks
foundational_books_and_papers.relevance: Foundational deep learning approach for probabilistic forecasting with RNNs.

foundational_books_and_papers.name: Temporal Fusion Transformers
foundational_books_and_papers.relevance: Interpretable multi-horizon forecasting model; common reference for deep TS architectures.

foundational_books_and_papers.name: M5 Forecasting Accuracy Competition
foundational_books_and_papers.relevance: Large-scale retail forecasting benchmark; useful for feature-based forecasting patterns.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: statsmodels Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Classical time series models (ARIMA/SARIMAX/state space) and diagnostics.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: sktime Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Unified Python framework for time series ML with consistent evaluation interfaces.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: Prophet Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Interpretable seasonal/trend decomposition model; common baseline for business forecasting.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: LightGBM Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Strong baseline for feature-based forecasting with lag/rolling/calendar features.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: PyTorch Forecasting Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Deep learning forecasting library; includes TFT and common multi-horizon patterns.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: GluonTS Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Probabilistic forecasting toolkit with DeepAR and related models.

toolkits_and_libraries.name: Darts Documentation
toolkits_and_libraries.relevance: Time series ML library supporting classical and deep forecasting approaches.

time_series_foundation_models.name: TimesFM 2.5
time_series_foundation_models.relevance: Google's time series foundation model with XReg covariate support; competitive zero-shot performance.

time_series_foundation_models.name: Chronos-2 (Amazon)
time_series_foundation_models.relevance: Universal forecasting with multivariate/covariate support (Oct 2025); best accuracy on GIFT-Eval benchmarks.

time_series_foundation_models.name: Chronos-2 Announcement Blog
time_series_foundation_models.relevance: Official announcement covering Chronos-2 capabilities, Chronos-Bolt performance (250x faster), and benchmark results.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: Monash Time Series Forecasting Repository
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: Collection of forecasting datasets for evaluation and benchmarking.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: UCI Machine Learning Repository
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: Dataset source for prototyping and baseline comparisons (verify suitability and licensing).

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: Governance baseline for risk management; relevant for high-impact forecasting deployments.
